label: Bladder
quick_take: Bladder is one of the most definition-sensitive sites — CI5 flags that non-invasive tumours may be included, and several of the registry-level outliers almost certainly reflect Ta/Tis inclusion rather than biology. Setting that aside, the real stories are: (1) the **Naples cluster** of extreme male rates in vol XII, (2) the **bilharzial** (Mozambique, Malawi, Zimbabwe) women signal, and (3) the rising tide in Algeria and Israel Arabs.

findings.title: Zimbabwe Bulawayo African women, vol II: ASR 34.14, 8.3× the world median
findings.text: A classic schistosomiasis signal. Based on 8 cases in vol II — magnitude credible at the order-of-magnitude level but not precisely. Mozambique Lourenço Marques women (13.53) also elevated. These are bilharzial squamous bladder cancers, not the urothelial cancer of smokers. Pop_warning Bulawayo vol XII + coding_break bladder inherit.
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — Zimbabwe Bulawayo African women, vol II: ASR 34.14, 8.3× the world median

findings.title: Southern-Italian "Naples cluster" in vol XII
findings.text: Naples Centre 42.2, Naples North 41.6, Naples South 41.5, Caserta 39.7. All around 3.8× the world median, all clustered. Navarra (Spain) 39.2 matches. Either tobacco-cohort persistence or industrial exposure — worth a separate look.
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — Southern-Italian "Naples cluster" in vol XII

findings.title: Algeria Sétif women, inverted-U
findings.text: 0.07 → 2.50 (vol X) → 1.14 (n=2→24). Israel Arab women 0.22 → 3.18 (vol XI). Algeria baseline sits at 1–2 cases — the +1500 % headline is exaggerated by the tiny numerator; the direction is nevertheless one of the few rising female-bladder trajectories.
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — Algeria Sétif women, inverted-U

findings.title: Japan Miyagi and Osaka men: U-shape recovery
findings.text: 6.12 → 5.48 → 15.61; 7.50 → 7.03 → 17.54. Either delayed tobacco-cohort signal or better endoscopic detection.
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — Japan Miyagi and Osaka men: U-shape recovery

findings.title: India Trivandrum men: 17.63 (vol VII) → 1.94 (vol VIII) → 4.94 (vol XII)
findings.text: Same vol VII–VIII cliff as seen in multiple other sites in this registry — scope change, not biology.
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — India Trivandrum men: 17.63 (vol VII) → 1.94 (vol VIII) → 4.94 (vol XII)

findings.title: Italy Ragusa vol V: M:F ratio 24:1
findings.text: , Karunagappally 21:1, Hungary County Vas 18:1. Mediterranean male-smoking signatures.
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — Italy Ragusa vol V: M:F ratio 24:1

findings.title: Kidney (code 42) and bladder both show a Miyagi / Osaka / LA-Filipino cluster of U-shapes
findings.text: Might be worth treating these two sites as a coordinated "urinary tract in urbanising East Asia" pair.
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — Kidney (code 42) and bladder both show a Miyagi / Osaka / LA-Filipino cluster of U-shapes

findings.title: USA ethnic contrast persistent at 14×
findings.text: in vol X (White 8.25 vs other 0.58 women).
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — USA ethnic contrast persistent at 14×

findings.title: cancer_warning
findings.text: bladder may include non-invasive tumours. Any cross-registry level comparison must acknowledge this — registries with good urology services count Ta/Tis while others don't. The Italian Naples + Navarra cluster may partly reflect aggressive TURBT + Ta capture.
India Trivandrum vol VII–VIII is almost certainly a registry scope change.
Zimbabwe Bulawayo vol II female rate is based on small numbers from a single 1960s volume — credible but cannot be tracked.

findings.title: Naples bladder cluster in vol XII
findings.text: deserves a standalone look: is it industrial (tanneries, dye), tobacco, or registration?
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — Naples bladder cluster in vol XII

findings.title: Schistosomiasis bladder cancer geography
findings.text: Zimbabwe + Mozambique + Malawi in the 1960s–70s, paired with Egypt Gharbiah — though Egypt sits lower than expected in CI5, suggesting under-ascertainment.
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — Schistosomiasis bladder cancer geography

findings.text: The Algerian / Arab-Israeli women's rise is subtle but consistent.
